summary: Tested all 10 bug fixes for the SaaS platform sprint. All fixes verified via backend API tests (10/10 pass) and frontend Playwright tests. Created test tenant 'testpartner242' and customer 'TEST_bugfix242_customer@example.com' for testing. All 10 issues confirmed resolved.
critical_code_review_comments: GDPR export verification requires orders to exist - tested code path in gdpr_service.py (line 56-61) shows correct items attachment logic
Two duplicate Terms & Conditions records created during test setup (default + manually created via POST) - not a bug but may need cleanup
T&C modal in Cart.tsx - {user_name} replacement uses customer?.full_name, but customer object loading might be async - edge case if customer data loads late
seed_data_creation: Created test tenant 'testpartner242' (id: 19320269-53f5-4449-9802-4c988b67bbf4), partner admin user, and customer account TEST_bugfix242_customer@example.com. Created T&C content with HTML and {product_name} placeholder for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test tenant 'testpartner242' and customer 'TEST_bugfix242_customer@example.com / Test@bugfix242!' are pre-created. Partner admin: partneradmin@testpartner242.local / Admin@123!. Product available: 'Sample Service' (id: b0723570-1cc4-4bf5-983e-96469af56be2). T&C has been configured with HTML content including {product_name} placeholder for testing the cart T&C modal.

issue_verification_summary.issue_1_store_all_default: PASS - categoryFromSlug returns null for no-slug, Store shows 'All Services' heading, 'All' button highlighted by default
issue_verification_summary.issue_2_cart_quantity: PASS - Order preview API includes quantity=3 (tested), Cart shows 'Qty: 1' for each item
issue_verification_summary.issue_3_tc_html_rendering: PASS - T&C modal uses dangerouslySetInnerHTML, HTML renders correctly (h2 as heading, strong as bold, ul/li as bullets) - no raw tags visible
issue_verification_summary.issue_4_product_name_replacement: PASS - {product_name} replaced with 'Sample Service' in T&C modal, visible in rendered output
issue_verification_summary.issue_5_whitespace_trim: PASS - TopNav shows 'Hi, Test' (uses .trim().split(' ')[0]), Portal shows 'Welcome, Test BugFix Profile User' with no double spaces
issue_verification_summary.issue_6_profile_address_update: PASS - PUT /api/me with address updates address in MongoDB addresses collection; verified via GET /api/me returning updated address
issue_verification_summary.issue_7_profile_toast: PASS - 'Profile updated' success toast shown after successful PUT /api/me; 400/500 would show error toast (code reviewed)
issue_verification_summary.issue_8_gdpr_order_items: PASS - gdpr_service.py lines 56-61 correctly fetch and attach order_items to each order; GDPR export structure includes 'orders' key with items list
issue_verification_summary.issue_9_tc_editor_focus: PASS - Typed 'TESTINGEDITOR' in TipTap editor without focus loss; focused element maintained 'contenteditable=true' with class 'ProseMirror-focused' throughout typing
issue_verification_summary.issue_10_back_button: PASS - data-testid='product-back-button' found on product detail page, text='Back', navigate(-1) correctly returns to /store
